activity_summary: An intake coordinator reviews administrative appointment readiness and decides schedule, return missing forms, or escalate insurance verification.
command_display: codex exec --model gpt-5.5 -c model_reasoning_effort="xhigh" --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check --ephemeral --color never --output-schema <schema> --output-last-message <output> -
notes: GPT-5.5 output captured through codex for the JudgmentKit 3x4 model UI matrix.

parsed.summary: Static intake_packet admin console candidate showing Avery Morgan's blocked 10:30 AM scheduling endpoint and the next CRUD update context.
parsed.css: main{font-family:system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,sans-serif;color:#1f2933;background:#f7f8fa;padding:24px;max-width:980px;margin:0 auto}.top{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:16px;align-items:flex-start;border-bottom:1px solid #d8dee6;padding-bottom:16px}.eyebrow{font-size:12px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;color:#5f6b7a;margin:0 0 6px}h1{font-size:24px;margin:0;color:#111827}p{margin:6px 0;line-height:1.4}.badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;border:1px solid #b45309;background:#fff7ed;color:#8a3a00;border-radius:999px;padding:6px 10px;font-weight:700;font-size:13px;white-space:nowrap}.grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.1fr .9fr;gap:14px;margin-top:16px}.panel{background:#fff;border:1px solid #d8dee6;border-radius:8px;padding:14px}.panel h2{font-size:15px;margin:0 0 10px;color:#243040}.row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;border-top:1px solid #edf0f3;padding:9px 0}.row:first-of-type{border-top:0}.label{color:#64748b;font-size:13px}.value{font-weight:650;color:#111827;text-align:right}.queue{border-left:4px solid #b45309}.schema{font-family:ui-monospace,SFMono-Regular,Menlo,monospace;font-size:12px;background:#f1f5f9;border:1px solid #d8dee6;border-radius:6px;padding:10px;white-space:normal}.actions{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:12px}button{border:1px solid #9aa6b2;background:#fff;border-radius:6px;padding:8px 11px;font-weight:650}button.primary{background:#1f5f8b;color:#fff;border-color:#1f5f8b}@media(max-width:720px){main{padding:16px}.top,.grid{display:block}.badge{margin-top:12px}.panel{margin-top:12px}.row{display:block}.value{text-align:left;display:block;margin-top:3px}}
